briefs.title: Voice-Powered Study Assistant
briefs.description: A CS student wants an app that records lectures, transcribes the audio, summarizes key concepts, answers questions about the material, and reads answers back out loud during study sessions.
briefs.constraints: Free tiers only, single user, must handle recordings up to 2 hours

briefs.title: Customer Support Copilot for a SaaS Startup
briefs.description: A fast-growing SaaS company is overwhelmed with support tickets. They want an AI assistant that searches their documentation to answer common questions instantly and drafts suggested replies for edge cases that fall outside the docs. Answers must never come from general knowledge — only from company documentation.
briefs.constraints: Answers must come from company docs only, must handle thousands of simultaneous users, zero downtime tolerance

briefs.title: AI Code Reviewer for a Solo Developer
briefs.description: An independent developer wants an AI tool that reviews pull requests, detects bugs and risky code patterns, suggests improvements before merges, and automatically notifies them via Slack when a review is ready.
briefs.constraints: Solo developer workflow, fast feedback required, must integrate with existing GitHub setup

briefs.title: Personalized AI News Digest
briefs.description: A busy professional wants a daily briefing that pulls fresh articles on technology, business, and global events every morning, summarizes the key stories, and delivers everything as a short email digest.
briefs.constraints: Must fetch fresh web content daily, digest must arrive by 8am

briefs.title: AI Image Generation for an E-Commerce Store
briefs.description: An online store wants to stop paying photographers for every new product. They need a system that takes a product name and description, generates polished image variations, and delivers them ready for product pages and ad campaigns.
briefs.constraints: High visual quality required, small team with no design background, must handle batch generation for new product launches

briefs.title: AI Research Assistant for a Journalist
briefs.description: A journalist needs help researching stories across live web sources, public records, and news archives. They want an AI that can search the open web, summarize findings, and answer questions with citations so every claim can be traced back to its source.
briefs.constraints: Accuracy matters more than speed, every answer must cite a source URL, sources must be live and current not static documents

briefs.title: Multilingual Chatbot for a Small Business
briefs.description: A small local business wants a chatbot on their website that answers customer questions in multiple languages and helps users book appointments. The owner has no technical background and needs to manage the chatbot through a visual interface without writing any code.
briefs.constraints: No technical staff, low budget, must be fully manageable through a visual no-code interface, must support at least 3 languages

briefs.title: Automated Social Media Content Creator
briefs.description: A startup marketing team wants a system that takes blog posts and product updates as input, rewrites them as platform-specific social media captions, generates matching promotional graphics, and queues posts for publishing automatically.
briefs.constraints: Small marketing team, must produce both text and visuals in one pipeline, must post to multiple platforms without manual effort

briefs.title: Document Q&A System for a Law Firm
briefs.description: A law firm wants an internal AI assistant that ingests contracts, legal memos, and case files from their private servers, then answers staff questions with citations to the exact source document and page number. Documents must never leave the firm's infrastructure.
briefs.constraints: Documents must stay on private infrastructure, every answer must cite its exact source, zero tolerance for hallucination

briefs.title: Real-Time Meeting Summarizer
briefs.description: A remote startup wants a system that joins video calls, transcribes multi-speaker conversations with speaker labels, generates a structured summary, and automatically extracts and assigns action items to the right team member within five minutes of the call ending.
briefs.constraints: Must correctly attribute speech to the right speaker, summary and action items must be delivered within 5 minutes of call end
